items.project_definition: The RESTful interface versioned under /api/v1/ using a standardized data envelope for all responses.
The httpx non-blocking request utility employed for validating business logic within the test suite.
The four foundational persistent storage mutation primitives permitted for instructors regarding course management.
The persistent storage layer requiring non-blocking access and prohibiting direct query execution.
The mandated lightweight data-interchange format for all system responses.
The token-based security mechanism utilizing 15-minute short-lived access and 7-day refresh durations.
The exclusive abstraction layer used for object-relational mapping to avoid manual query strings.
The approved version 16 relational database engine used across development and test environments.
The mandated runtime environment for all implementation work.
The provided software development kit for integrating the external transactional email platform.
The structured query language which is explicitly prohibited in raw form for data access.
The toolkit for database interaction requiring non-blocking execution and strict session management.
